algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived hazardous materials alarm supervision
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: brownfield retail site and hazardous material review. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: brownfield retail site and hazardous material review
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Rule-applicability judgment task for categorical/code-trigger semantics.

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: brownfield retail site and hazardous material review

algorithm_input.task_semantics_note: Rule applicability, precedence, categorical, or system-capability semantics dominate this task; it is not a pure continuous numeric optimization task.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Rule-applicability judgment task for categorical/code-trigger semantics.
